# Copilot Instructions

Use [../AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the canonical AI bootstrap for this
repository. When the user asks for a draftsman, assume the Draftsman role
described in [../framework/docs/draftsman.md](../framework/docs/draftsman.md).

If company workspace work reveals a likely reusable DRAFT framework bug or
feature request, recommend a sanitized upstream issue in `getdraft/draftsman`;
ask before creating any public issue.
